PF2E-AZTECS.Title: Aztec's Inline Links builder
PF2E-AZTECS.KeybindingHint: Summons the UI to build PF2e Inline Links.

Notifications.NoTextField: No text field active. Copied instead.
Notifications.InsertedAndCopied: Syntax inserted and copied to clipboard.

Resolve.none: Directly resolves a path or formula without wrapping it in a specific math function.
Resolve.max: Returns the highest of the provided values. (e.g. max(1, 2) = 2)
Resolve.min: Returns the lowest of the provided values. (e.g. min(1, 2) = 1)
Resolve.abs: Returns the absolute (positive) value of the input. (e.g. abs(-5) = 5)
Resolve.floor: Rounds the value down to the nearest whole number. (e.g. floor(2.9) = 2)
Resolve.ceil: Rounds the value up to the nearest whole number. (e.g. ceil(2.1) = 3)
Resolve.round: Rounds the value to the nearest whole number. (e.g. round(2.5) = 3)
Resolve.ternary: Evaluates a condition. If true, returns the first value; if false, returns the second. (e.g. condition ? true : false)

AutoCopyOnInsert.Name: Auto-copy on insert
AutoCopyOnInsert.Hint: Automatically copy the generated syntax to your clipboard whenever you insert it into a text field.

CloseOnInsert.Name: Close window on insert
CloseOnInsert.Hint: Automatically close the builder UI after successfully inserting the syntax.

CloseOnCopy.Name: Close window on copy
CloseOnCopy.Hint: Automatically close the builder UI after manually copying the syntax.
